steps: Brew espresso; combine with water, ice, and sweetener.
Pull espresso shot and serve immediately.
Grill patty, assemble burger with bun and toppings.
Cut potatoes, fry until golden brown, season lightly.
Bake cake layers and frost with cream and chocolate ganache.
Steam and combine espresso, cocoa, and steamed milk.
Steep tea leaves in hot water and serve warm.
Layer bacon, lettuce, and tomato on toasted bread.
Roll grilled vegetables in a soft tortilla wrap.
Toss greens with croutons, parmesan, and salad dressing.
Bread onion slices, then fry until crispy and golden.
Mix batter with fresh blueberries and bake until golden.
Blend fresh fruit with milk and ice until smooth.
Simmer tomatoes and onions, then finish with cream.
Bake until the cookies are golden and chewy.
Steam milk and pull espresso, then top with creamy foam.
Grill the chicken, layer with lettuce and tomato, and serve on toasted bread.
